pages.text: $(l)Living Root Grasp$() roots and binds enemies with living vines, immobilizing them.$(br2)$(l)Max Level:$() 6$(br)$(l)Type:$() Control$(br)$(l)Botania Mana Cost:$() 15,000 + 7,500/level$(br2)Applies Slowness to the target. With the $(o)livingRootImmobilize$() config option (default: true), this becomes full immobilization. Duration increases with spell level.
